description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive combination of wood and metal components. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are made of a warm-toned wood, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock, a curved detachable box magazine, and a standard-length barrel with iron sights mounted on top. The front sight is a post, and the rear sight is a notch, both integrated into the metal assembly. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details along the receiver and barrel. The rifle's form is iconic, with a slightly curved magazine and a straight, elongated barrel, making it easily recognizable in urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, dark metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The design is robust, with iron sights and a standard barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden components and magazine curvature.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
